status: manifest only; no raw data downloads, no commits to data/
purpose: Specify five IPUMS USA PUMS extracts (one per backtest cycle 2008/2012/2016/2020/2024) sufficient to populate VepUniverseRow instances per src/electorate/vepUniverseTypes.ts.
explicitly_not_in_this_manifest: No file checksums (those are recorded per-extract once downloaded).
No download URLs (IPUMS extracts require authenticated build; URLs are unique per extract).
No engine / mapper / signature-imputation-bridge / selector / topK / browser / dist / output / live-data / candidate / era-context / raw-data edits.

extracts.notes: ACS 5-year coverage starts 2009; for 2008 the 5-yr 2005-2009 is the workhorse with the 1-yr 2008 file as state-level supplement.
2020 1-year ACS NOT released (COVID-driven response collapse). 5-yr is the only ACS option.
If 2020-2024 not yet shipped, use 2019-2023 with documented vintage_lag: 1 flag in coverageNotes.

demographics.notes: IPUMS-harmonized RACE; RACED carries detail for collapsing
Detailed race code; not on row
Detailed education code; not on row

subset_filters.STATEFIP: 1..56 (50 states + DC; excludes PR (72) and minor territories)
subset_filters.rationale: US territories do not vote in presidential elections; bridge has no signature template for non-state populations.

citizenship.note: Born abroad of US parents -> us_born because they are constitutionally eligible voters.

vep_eligible_derivation.formula: vepEligible = (age >= 18) AND (citizenship ∈ {us_born, us_naturalized}) AND NOT state_disenfranchised(state, demographic_cell)
vep_eligible_derivation.felon_disenfranchisement: Static per-state percentage from the Sentencing Project tracker; surfaces in coverageNotes when applied.

files_per_cycle: README.md (extract metadata: extract id, query parameters, sha256 checksums, download date; COMMITTABLE)

gitignore.rationale: Mirrors data/backtest-sources/ convention (FEC PDFs, Election Lab CSVs are similarly untracked).

V1_aggregate_vep.metric: Σ personWeight where vepEligible = true (per year)

V2_state_level_vep.metric: Σ personWeight where vepEligible = true (per year, per state)
V2_state_level_vep.pass_criterion: max per-state gap < 0.02; replicate-weight 90% CI must cover benchmark for small-N states

V3_age_x_citizenship_marginals.compared_to: ACS B05003 published cells via Census API
V3_age_x_citizenship_marginals.pass_criterion: 90% CI from replicate weights overlaps published cell

checks: every weight finite and >= 0 (zero allowed by IPUMS contract)
per (state, year) Kish design effect (Σw)²/Σw² in [1.5, 5.0]

V5_eligibility_invariant.metric: Every row with vepEligible=true has age>=18 AND citizenship ∈ {us_born, us_naturalized}
V5_eligibility_invariant.enforced_by: validateVepUniverseRow in src/electorate/vepUniverseTypes.ts; loader smoke re-verifies on full corpus

V6_weight_non_negativity.metric: personWeight > 0 and finite for every row

V7_donor_cell_sparsity_cross_check.metric: For each (year, state, race × sex × age_bucket × education) cell, count CES/CCES donors
V7_donor_cell_sparsity_cross_check.purpose: Pre-flight for the bridge's MIN_DONORS=25 threshold; thin cells flagged for backoff awareness

acquisition_gate.policy: User must explicitly approve before any IPUMS USA login / extract / download.
acquisition_gate.this_manifest: Specifies what to acquire. Does not initiate acquisition.
checklist: Configure five extracts per the extracts table; apply subset filters
Submit each extract; record IPUMS extract ID per cycle README
Compute sha256 of each .dat.gz; record in cycle README
Commit only data/acs-pums/.gitignore + per-cycle README.md files; never raw data
Run vepUniverseLoader.ts smoke (Phase 2.7 v1) and verify V1-V7 all pass before universe is bridge-ready

open_issues_for_v1_loader: Sentencing Project tracker URL + retrieval cadence for state_disenfranchised lookup table.
PUMA-2010 vs PUMA-2020 boundary changes — pre-2018 PUMS uses 2010 boundaries; 2018+ uses 2020; cross-vintage analyses need a crosswalk.
Whether to ship MRP raking helper inside the loader or as a separate module (prefer separate).
terminology: vepEligible is the population-skeleton invariant. Engagement is a downstream-of-universe concern — separate 1D continuous scalar per ADR canon, not surfaced by PUMS. Compound moral-circle (moralBoundaries) terminology applies at the bridge step (already shipped at d2c9e14), not at extract time. Legacy code identifiers (PWGTP, RAC1P, SCHL, HINCP, STATEFIP etc.) appear only as PUMS / IPUMS column names.
